popularStory.headline: Douce de Gévaudan (1090-1129)
popularStory.description: Douce de Gévaudan dite Douce de Carlat ou Douce d'Arles (née vers 1090, morte vers 1129), comtesse de Provence, vicomtesse de Millau, à moitié de Carlat, était la fille de Gilbert Ier, vicomte de Géva …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Douce de Gévaudan於1086年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯勒瓦丹時，她的父親Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan31歲，母親Gerberge comtesse de Provence27歲。她於1112年2月3日與Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona在法國布-度-o結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1137年11月28日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Douce de Gévaudan于1086年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯勒瓦丹时，她的父亲Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan31岁，母亲Gerberge comtesse de Provence27岁。她于1112年2月3日与Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona在法国布-度-o结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1137年11月28日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gévaudan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Gévaudan): habitational name from Gévaudan, a region in Lozère, named after the Gabali, a Gallic tribe. Compare Gevedon and Jividen , and also Givaudan .

History: The surname Gévaudan was brought to North America by various immigrants from France. But descendants of the first immigrant with this name, a Huguenot from southern France, bear altered forms of the name (see Jividen ).

variants.name: Jividen
meanings: Altered form of French Gévaudan (see Gevaudan ). Compare Gividen .

History: The Jividens trace their origin to Antoine Gévaudan alias Jividen, a Huguenot from southern France, who in 1726 died in Manakin, VA. In the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors he is listed with the original form of his surname, Gévaudan (along with its variant Givaudan ), while in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of the Founders of Manakin the common altered form Jividen is also found. His descendants also bear the surnames Geveden, Gevedon, and Gividen.

variants.name: Gevedon
meanings: Altered form of French Gévaudan (see Gevaudan ). See also Jividen .

nameMeanings.name: Douce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dowse
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English douce, dowce ‘sweet, pleasant’ (Old French dolz, dous, later doux), or from the Middle English personal name Douce (borrowed from Old French Douce, Latin Dulcia, derived from Latin dulcis) with the same meaning. The name was sometimes used as a woman's personal name and occasionally used for a man. The modern name is mostly pronounced to rhyme with house but sometimes with loose, as indicated by the variant Duce.

en.lifeSummary: When Douce de Gévaudan was born in 1086, in Gévaudan, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, her father, Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan, was 31 and her mother, Gerberge comtesse de Provence, was 27. She married Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona on 3 February 1112, in Bouches-du-Rhône, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 28 November 1137, in Essonne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Douce de Gévaudan est née en 1086, à Gévaudan, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Gerberge comtesse de Provence, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona le 3 février 1112, à Bouches-du-Rhône, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 novembre 1137, à Essonne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Douce de Gévaudan 1086 in Gévaudan, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan 31 und ihre Mutter Gerberge comtesse de Provence 27. Sie hat am 3. Februar 1112 in Bouches-du-Rhône, Frankreich Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. November 1137 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Douce de Gévaudan è nata il nel 1086 nel Gévaudan, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, sua padre, Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Gerberge comtesse de Provence, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona il 3 febbraio 1112, nel Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 novembre 1137, nel Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Douce de Gévaudanが1086年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスグeヴァウダンで生まれた時，父Gilbert Ier de Gévaudanは31歳，母Gerberge comtesse de Provenceは27歳であった。1112年2月3日にフランスボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンでRaymond Bérenger III de Barcelonaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1137年11月28日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Douce de Gévaudan(이)가 1086년 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-플로븐스 그e바던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gerberge comtesse de Provence(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1112년 2월 3일 프랑스 부체스-드-ho니에서 Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1137년 11월 28일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Douce de Gévaudan nasceu em 1086, em Gévaudan, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Gerberge comtesse de Provence, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona em 3 de fevereiro de 1112, em Bouches-du-Rhône, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1137, em Essonne, Île-de-France, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Douce de Gévaudan родилась в 1086 г. в местности гeваудан, алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, её отцу по имени Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Gerberge comtesse de Provence, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona 3 февраля 1112 г. в местности боучес-ду-рoн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 28 ноября 1137 г. в местности эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Douce de Gévaudan nació en 1086, en Gévaudan, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Gilbert Ier de Gévaudan, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Gerberge comtesse de Provence, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona el 3 de febrero de 1112, en Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1137, en Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
